mapper.select: SELECT id, demand_id AS demandId, current_tier AS currentTier, status FROM match_task WHERE demand_id = #{demandId} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO match_task (demand_id, current_tier, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{demandId}, #{currentTier}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE match_task SET status = 'SUCCESS', success_owner_id = #{ownerId}, success_service_item_id = #{serviceItemId}, ended_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{taskId}
UPDATE match_task SET status = 'FAILED', fail_reason = #{failReason}, ended_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{taskId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO match_attempt (task_id, demand_id, owner_id, service_item_id, tier_no, distance_meter, distance_source, route_distance_km, straight_distance_km, eta_minutes, match_reason, service_name, village_name, distance_layer, status, response_deadline_seconds, owner_response_deadline, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{taskId}, #{demandId}, #{ownerId}, #{serviceItemId}, #{tierNo}, #{distanceMeter}, #{distanceSource}, #{routeDistanceKm}, #{straightDistanceKm}, #{etaMinutes}, #{matchReason}, #{serviceName}, #{villageName}, #{distanceLayer}, #{status}, 120, #{ownerResponseDeadline}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT id, task_id AS taskId, demand_id AS demandId, owner_id AS ownerId, service_item_id AS serviceItemId, tier_no AS tierNo, distance_meter AS distanceMeter, distance_source AS distanceSource, route_distance_km AS routeDistanceKm, straight_distance_km AS straightDistanceKm, eta_minutes AS etaMinutes, match_reason AS matchReason, service_name AS serviceName, village_name AS villageName, distance_layer AS distanceLayer, status, owner_response_deadline AS ownerResponseDeadline, farmer_confirm_deadline AS farmerConfirmDeadline FROM match_attempt WHERE id = #{attemptId} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO contact_session (demand_id, match_attempt_id, owner_id, farmer_id, service_item_id, status, active_flag, masked_phone, contact_mode, expire_at, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{demandId}, #{matchAttemptId}, #{ownerId}, #{farmerId}, #{serviceItemId}, #{sessionStatus}, 1, '170****0002', #{contactMode}, #{expireAt}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT id, demand_id AS demandId, owner_id AS ownerId, farmer_id AS farmerId, service_item_id AS serviceItemId, match_attempt_id AS matchAttemptId, status AS sessionStatus, contact_mode AS contactMode, expire_at AS expireAt FROM contact_session WHERE match_attempt_id = #{attemptId} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE contact_session SET status = #{status}, active_flag = CASE WHEN #{status} IN ('CLOSED', 'EXPIRED') THEN 0 ELSE active_flag END, confirmed_at = CASE WHEN #{status} = 'CONTACT_ACTIVE' THEN NOW() ELSE confirmed_at END, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{sessionId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO order_info (demand_id, match_attempt_id, farmer_id, owner_id, service_item_id, contact_session_id, status, owner_confirmed_finish, farmer_confirmed_finish, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{demandId}, #{matchAttemptId}, #{farmerId}, #{ownerId}, #{serviceItemId}, #{contactSessionId}, #{status}, 0, 0, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT farmer_id FROM demand WHERE id = #{demandId} LIMIT 1
SELECT id FROM match_attempt WHERE status = 'PENDING_RESPONSE' AND owner_response_deadline IS NOT NULL AND owner_response_deadline < NOW()

SELECT ma.id FROM match_attempt ma JOIN contact_session cs ON cs.match_attempt_id = ma.id WHERE ma.status = 'WAIT_FARMER_CONFIRM' AND cs.status IN ('WAIT_FARMER_CONFIRM', 'WAITING_FARMER_CONFIRM') AND cs.expire_at IS NOT NULL AND cs.expire_at < NOW()
